column1: # Manner adverbs — how an action is carried out.
# Belongs here: non-onomatopoeic manner words (ゆっくり, じっと, 正々堂々).
# Sound/state mimetics go in onomatopoeia.tsv. Adjective 〜く/〜に forms (早く,
# 静かに) are conjugations — they live in the adjective decks, not here.

column4: fair and square; openly and honorably
with all one's might; as hard as one can
column5: [一: one | 生: life | 懸: stake/hang | 命: life]
